# Reservations in Slurm

## List current reservations

```bash
scontrol show reservations
```

Example output:

```bash
ReservationName=teaching_friday StartTime=2026-04-17T11:00:00 EndTime=2026-04-17T13:00:00 Duration=02:00:00
   Nodes=node046 NodeCnt=1 CoreCnt=126 Features=(null) PartitionName=teachingnodes Flags=FLEX,WEEKLY,MAGNETIC
     NodeName=node046 CoreIDs=0-4,6,8-13,15-17,19-21,24-30,41-79,84-88,91,108-112,115-138,141-167
   TRES=cpu=126
   Users=(null) Groups=(null) Accounts=teaching Licenses=(null) State=INACTIVE BurstBuffer=(null)
   MaxStartDelay=(null)
```

## Delete a reservation

Generally, while you can update reservations, certain parameters can't be modified.
It's often more straightforward to delete and recreate the reservation.

```bash
scontrol delete ReservationName=teaching_friday
```
